S3.T4 (Stop hooks extension claude-code style — crates/grid-engine/src/agent/stop_hooks.rs (261 LOC incl 4 unit tests) + tests/stop_hooks_integration.rs (404 LOC 4 integration tests) + surgical mods harness.rs (+55) / loop_config.rs (+23) / mod.rs (+4) = 5 files 747 insertions. StopHookDecision::{Noop, InjectAndContinue(Vec<ChatMessage>)} async trait, NoOpStopHook default impl, dispatch_stop_hooks() 'first decisive verdict' semantics (first InjectAndContinue wins, remaining hooks still run for observability side effects, errors treated as Noop without poisoning subsequent), MAX_STOP_HOOK_INJECTIONS=3 re-entry cap. Harness wiring adds NEW dispatch site at natural termination boundary (line ~1732 after 'if stop_reason != StopReason::ToolUse' block) — fire_post_task_hooks signature UNCHANGED preserving per-round PostTask vs per-termination Stop separation. AgentLoopConfig.stop_hooks: Vec<Arc<dyn StopHook>> default empty (backward compat, zero-cost when not used), builder methods stop_hook()+stop_hooks(). Death-spiral prevention: all 14 provider/stream/SecurityBlocked/LoopGuard/EStop/cancel error paths return BEFORE line 1732 — reviewer independently verified watertight across harness.rs:1201/1262/209/222/578/603/624/527/1558/1576/1864/1996/2161/2173/2197. Test 3 locks invariant with strict hook_runs==0 assertion. Verification: cargo check -p grid-engine clean (21s incremental); stop_hooks_integration 4/4 PASS; stop_hooks unit tests 4/4 PASS; d87 2/2 + hook_failure_mode 6/6 + agent_loop_config 3/3 ZERO regressions. Reviewer APPROVE-WITH-COMMENTS 0 Criticals, M2 inline-fixed (rustdoc clarifies 'fires on every termination boundary including pure text-chat with zero tool calls' — distinguishes from D87 continuation gate which requires total_tool_calls>0), M1 deferred to D114 (legacy fire_post_task_hooks calls PostTask+LoopTurnEnd+SessionEnd every round; with Stop re-entry SessionEnd fires N+1 times per session — rename to LoopRoundEnd or restrict SessionEnd to true exit path, defer ADR-V2-006 in S3.T5), N1 deferred to D115 (MAX_STOP_HOOK_INJECTIONS hardcoded; blueprint lists 4 candidate use cases but cap is 3 — config tunability for Phase 2.5+), N2-N4 cosmetic. Design lesson: Keeping fire_post_task_hooks UNCHANGED + adding parallel dispatch site is strictly better than modifying signature — preserves existing per-round contract without cascading to callers, two dispatch points sit at semantically distinct boundaries (per-round observability vs per-termination injection). 3 new Deferred D114/D115/D116: D114 SessionEnd semantic rename, D115 cap config tunability, D116 test coverage for SecurityBlocked/LoopGuard/EStop skip paths. Scope strictly respected: no scoped-hook executor (S3.T5), no skill SKILL.md changes, no proto changes, no live LLM, no ADR-V2-006. RuFlo swarm-1776216312625 hierarchical: scout (Explore) 196-line blueprint /tmp/s3t4-blueprint.md → coder (4+4 PASS first-pass) → reviewer → M2 inline-fixed → re-verified. Plan 18/23. @ a209716)

S3.T5 (Scoped-hook executor — ADR-V2-006 Accepted 2026-04-15 (278 LOC envelope contract: §2 PreToolUse/PostToolUse/Stop stdin JSON schema, §3 GRID_* env vars, §4 exit 0/2/other contract, §5 substitute_hook_vars, §6 5s timeout, §7 fail-open, §8 cross-runtime parity, §10 4 test vectors). 9 files / +1700 LOC. Rust G1 (harness.rs): register_scoped_hooks += HookVars param; new build_hook_vars with SKILL_DIR priority inline-content > cache-dir > None; fs::create_dir_all + fs::write materializes SkillInstructions.content → {workspace}/grid-session-{sid}/skill/SKILL.md; per-hook substitute_hook_vars error → continue (skip, not fail session); eaasp-skill-registry Cargo dep added. Rust G7 (scoped_hook_handler.rs): new ScopedStopHookBridge struct impl StopHook trait reusing execute_command — exit 2 → InjectAndContinue([System ChatMessage{stderr}]), exit 0 → Noop, other → Noop (fail-open), 3 unit tests. AgentRuntime new field session_stop_hooks: DashMap + register_session_stop_hooks(); build_and_spawn_executor_filtered drains via remove() before executor.set_stop_hooks(). AgentExecutor new stop_hooks: Vec<Arc<dyn StopHook>> forwarded into AgentLoopConfig struct literal. Python G2 (scoped_command_executor.py 314 LOC): ScopedHookDecision frozen dataclass + ScopedCommandExecutor (asyncio.create_subprocess_shell, env+stdin JSON envelope, timeout kill+wait, fail-open on bad JSON / exit 127 / timeout) + ScopedHookBundle Pre/Post/Stop partitioner with precedence sort. Python G3 (service.py +333 LOC): Initialize materializes SKILL.md to {workspace}/skill/ when content+frontmatter_hooks both non-empty; substitute_scoped_hooks with per-hook skip-on-error; 3 dispatch helpers _dispatch_scoped_pre_tool_use / _post_tool_use / _stop with ADR §2 envelope + §3 env_extras + first-deny short-circuit; teardown pops _scoped_bundles/_scoped_executors. SkillLoader +first_skill_id(). Python tests (test_scoped_hook_executor_integration.py 180 LOC, 6 pytest-asyncio): real block_write_scada.sh deny on scada_write + allow on bash; sleep-10 timeout fail-open + WARN; exit 127 fail-open; envelope→stdin round-trip with temp cat script; ${SKILL_DIR} substitution integration. Rust tests (scoped_hook_wiring_integration.rs 399 LOC, 4 integration): inline_skill_content_materializes_skill_dir (disk file byte check), cache_dir_resolution_when_no_inline_content, stop_scope_hook_registers_bridge (3 sub-cases inc. real check_output_anchor.sh), unresolved_skill_dir_skips_hook_with_log (handler-count-delta proof technique, robust vs builtin SecurityPolicyHandler pollution). Total verification: grid-runtime 107 + 2 ignored (8 suites, 1.69s) INCLUDING 4 new integration + 3 new stop_bridge unit; grid-engine 2323 + 3 ignored (90 suites, 61.17s); claude-code-runtime 104 PASS + 6 new PASS (1 pre-existing D110 test_default_config drift unchanged). Zero regressions. Reviewer APPROVE-WITH-COMMENTS 0 Criticals, N1 inline-fixed (skill_dir None log 'None'→'<unresolved>'). 3 Majors all deferred: D120 cross-runtime envelope parity — Rust HookContext::to_json/to_env_vars predate ADR-V2-006 missing event/skill_id/draft_memory_id/evidence_anchor_id/created_at fields + GRID_EVENT/GRID_SKILL_ID env; Python fully compliant; shipped hooks (block_write_scada reads .tool_name, check_output_anchor reads .output.evidence_anchor_id) coincidentally unaffected; must close before Phase 2.5 goose cert. D121 register_session_stop_hooks additive not replace, no current double-register. D122 Python envelope top-level hook_id vs Rust omit (ADR §2.5 forward-compat safe). Deferred-merge: D50 renamed→D117 (Prompt executor, blueprint §F defer per user agreement — no real consumer yet). D51+D53 closed. New Deferred D117-D123. Scope non-negotiables honored: no Prompt executor code, no proto changes, no SKILL.md schema change, no hermes touches, no live LLM. Key design lessons: (1) Rust execute_command + HookContext inherit pre-ADR era schema, needs D120 catchup with cross-runtime parity test vectors, shipped hooks coincidentally unaffected by schema divergence; (2) build_and_spawn_executor_filtered is sync → DashMap correct primitive (tokio::sync::RwLock would panic inside runtime context, blocking_write also wrong); (3) parallel Stop dispatch site preserves fire_post_task_hooks UNCHANGED — two dispatch points at semantically distinct boundaries (per-round observability vs per-termination typed injection); (4) handler-count delta test for skip-with-log is robust against HookRegistry pollution from builtin SecurityPolicyHandler which always registers at PreToolUse; (5) Python SKILL.md materialization guards on BOTH non-empty content AND non-empty frontmatter_hooks (avoids spurious dir creation for skill-less sessions); (6) test ENV_MUTEX serializes env-var mutation, tempdir lifetimes held via captured TempDir preventing Drop mid-test; (7) dispatch helpers extracted per-event type on Python side avoids 3x ~40 LOC duplication inside OnToolCall/OnToolResult/OnStop. RuFlo swarm-1776243400662 hierarchical: scout (Explore) 698-line blueprint /tmp/s3t5-blueprint.md → T5.A-E sequenced coders (T5.A ADR / T5.B Python / T5.C Rust-harness G1 / T5.D Rust-bridge G7+runtime API / T5.E Rust-integration-test) → reviewer APPROVE-WITH-COMMENTS → N1 inline-fixed → re-verified. Plan 19/23, S3 5/5 DONE. @ 7cb48eb)

S4.T4 (thread-scoped interrupt closes Phase 2 23/23 — new crates/grid-engine/src/agent/interrupt.rs 234 LOC (SessionInterruptRegistry = Arc<DashMap<SessionId, CancellationToken>> + pub const THREAD_SCOPED: bool = true lockdown via module-level `const _: () = assert!(SessionInterruptRegistry::THREAD_SCOPED)` compile-time gate + 7 unit tests) + new tests/session_interrupt_integration.rs 208 LOC (5 integration tests through real AgentRuntime::start_session) + runtime.rs +130 LOC (session_interrupts field on AgentRuntime, cancel_token field on SessionEntry populated at spawn + removed at stop_session, new pub async fn cancel_session(sid) dual-path dispatch [path 1: registry flag; path 2: handle.send(AgentMessage::Cancel) which is the authoritative mid-turn interrupt reaching executor.cancel_token → AgentLoopConfig.cancel_token → harness.rs:642/1687 reads], new #[doc(hidden)] pub fn get_session_cancel_token read accessor, new pub fn session_interrupts accessor, clone-handle-out-of-DashMap-guard-before-await pattern matching runtime_lifecycle.rs:55-63 + tracing::debug! on send-Err folded in) + harness.rs +9 LOC rustdoc-only clarifying per-session token isolation invariant at the two harness read sites + mod.rs pub mod interrupt + pub use SessionInterruptRegistry + tools/session.rs +1 LOC test-helper compile-fix. Total +149/-3 LOC across 6 tracked + 2 new files = 8 files staged. Two-stage RuFlo review: spec APPROVE-WITH-COMMENTS (C1 scope bleed via pre-existing cargo fmt drift on 169 files — surgically staged only S4.T4 via filtered xargs git checkout HEAD --, mirrors S2.T5 precedent; M1 thread_scoped marker not literal — added pub const THREAD_SCOPED + compile-time assert + grep-anchor test; M2 accessor visibility — #[doc(hidden)] pub + rustdoc pointing at D130 + future REST/gRPC consumer intent; D2 dual-path accepted after reviewer independently traced token chain and confirmed registry-only fire is observability only, path 2 required for acceptance criterion to reflect real behavior) then quality APPROVE-WITH-COMMENTS (M1 DashMap-Ref-across-await idiom violation in cancel_session — fixed to clone-handle-out-of-guard-before-await matching runtime_lifecycle.rs; M2 clippy::assertions_on_constants on runtime assert! of pub const — converted to module-level const _: () = assert!(...) compile-time + type-annotated binding in test for grep discovery; N2 silent send-Err — promoted to tracing::debug! preserving 'not an error' semantics while surfacing diagnostic signal; D131/D132/D133 candidates all closed inline). clippy -p grid-engine --tests --no-deps -- -D warnings clean on scoped files. Tests: 7 new interrupt unit + 5 integration PASS, regression suites multi_session 7/7 + session_isolation 4/4 + stop_hooks_integration 4/4 + d87 6/6 + hook_failure_mode 6/6 + agent_loop_config 3/3 all PASS zero regressions. 1 new Deferred D130 (session-lifetime vs per-turn cancel token 双 token 合并 via ChildCancellationToken parent propagation — Phase 2.5 consolidation, P1-defer). Design lesson: executor.rs:312 resets self.cancel_token per UserMessage making SessionEntry.cancel_token orphaned from what harness actually watches — dual-path workaround is correctness-preserving but D130 is the clean fix. RuFlo swarm hierarchical (scout + implementer + spec-reviewer + quality-reviewer + fix-up subagent for each review pass). Plan 23/23, S4 4/4 DONE, PHASE 2 CLOSES. @ f4bf9ad)

S1.name: Runtime 修复 + 错误基础设施 (批次 A)
S1.note: Batch A landed 2026-04-14. All inherited Phase-1 Deferred (D83/D85/D86) closed + retry infrastructure complete. Follow-up candidate: ServerMessage WS tool_name extension (D90?).

S2.name: L2 Memory Engine 增强 + tool-result 三层截断 (批次 B)
S2.s2t5_note: Landed 2026-04-15 @ bad4269. Scope corrected from plan: L1 (postprocess_tool_output hard_limit) + L2 (existing BlobStore per-result spill at 4KB threshold with [blob:sha256:<hash>] refs) already existed. Only L3 aggregate was the real gap. Implementation: new crates/grid-engine/src/agent/turn_budget.rs pure helper enforce_turn_aggregate_budget() — idempotent L2-aware filter via BlobStore::parse_blob_ref, deterministic size-desc + index-asc tie-break, char-count accounting matching soft_trim_tool_result. Wired at harness.rs L2287 under config.blob_store guard; TOOL_RESULT_TURN_BUDGET=200_000 chars. 3 unit tests in tests/tool_result_aggregate_spill.rs: under_budget_noop + over_budget_spills_largest_first + tie_break_deterministic (5x loop byte-identical). D60 closure: scripts/verify-v2-mvp.py assertion 11 upgraded from non-fatal print to raise AssertionError. Commit surgical — reset 170+ pre-existing cargo fmt drift files, kept only 5-file S2.T5 diff. cargo check -p grid-engine clean (incremental 12s); 3/3 PASS. Reviewer APPROVE 0 Criticals 0 Majors. Plan's proposed tool_result_storage.rs NOT created (would duplicate BlobStore). Plan's OctoRoot reference stale (crates renamed to grid-*); no new GridRoot helper needed — executor.rs already constructs BlobStore at L430.
S2.note: S2.T4 landed 2026-04-15 @ bd7545d: test-only commit, 11 new tests in tests/test_s2t4_state_machine.py (406 lines). Gap-closing scope — all 11 are new coverage, zero duplication with test_files/test_review_fixes/test_s2t3. Scout blueprint at /tmp/s2t4-blueprint.md, reviewer APPROVE-WITH-COMMENTS 0 Criticals 0 Majors + 1 cosmetic nit applied inline. Key coverage: (1) forward via write() direct (not just confirm/archive helpers) for both suggested→confirmed and confirmed→archived; (2) version monotonicity + created_at stable + updated_at non-decreasing + evidence_refs preserved across full state walk; (3) archived reversal via write() blocked (parametrized over agent_suggested/confirmed — archived→archived intentionally dropped because same-status rewrites are allowed, per test_write_same_status_is_allowed); (4) list(status=...) filter returns exactly matching latest versions; (5) REST 409 invalid_transition + 404 not_found body shape parity (uses resp.json()['detail']['code'] — FastAPI nests HTTPException(detail=dict) under 'detail', blueprint erratum → D101); (6) MCP dispatcher walk with read-path DB cross-check on embedding columns. Discovered production surface asymmetry → D100: write()/confirm()/archive() construct MemoryFileOut inline and omit embedding_model_id+embedding_dim; only read_latest() → _row_to_memory surfaces them. Test #10 navigates this via docstring + limited assertion. 114/114 PASS, ruff clean. Non-goals: no src/ changes, no concurrent writes (D12), no HNSW assertions. Orchestrator found 3 test bugs during verification and fixed inline: (1) zip(strict=True) with length-mismatch after [1:] slice, (2) archived→archived blocking assertion contradicts same-status no-op rule, (3) cross-step embedding equality impossible due to write-path asymmetry.

S3.name: PreCompact + Skill Extraction + Stop hooks + scoped-hook executor (批次 B)
S3.s3t5_note: Landed 2026-04-15 @ 7cb48eb. ADR-V2-006 Accepted (278 LOC envelope contract). 9 files / +1700 LOC: Rust G1 harness substitute_hook_vars wiring + SKILL_DIR materialization; Rust G7 ScopedStopHookBridge impl StopHook trait + AgentRuntime DashMap + AgentExecutor.set_stop_hooks; Python ScopedCommandExecutor subprocess path + service.py Initialize/dispatch wiring; 10 new tests (6 Python + 4 Rust integration + 3 Rust unit). Verification: grid-runtime 107+0 / grid-engine 2323+0 / claude-code-runtime 104+6 PASS, zero regressions. Reviewer APPROVE-WITH-COMMENTS 0 Criticals, N1 inline-fixed, 3 Majors deferred D120-D122. D50→D117 renamed+deferred per user agreement (no Prompt consumer yet). D51+D53 closed. Key design lesson: Rust HookContext/execute_command predate ADR-V2-006 — Python fully compliant, Rust schema catchup filed as D120 for Phase 2.5 goose cert.
S3.s3t4_note: Landed 2026-04-15 @ a209716. crates/grid-engine/src/agent/stop_hooks.rs (261 LOC) + tests/stop_hooks_integration.rs (404 LOC) + surgical harness.rs/loop_config.rs/mod.rs mods (5 files 747 insertions). StopHookDecision::{Noop, InjectAndContinue(Vec<ChatMessage>)} + async trait StopHook + dispatch_stop_hooks 'first decisive verdict' semantics + MAX_STOP_HOOK_INJECTIONS=3 cap. Harness adds NEW dispatch at termination boundary (line ~1732), fire_post_task_hooks UNCHANGED preserving per-round/per-termination separation. Death-spiral prevention verified across 14 error return paths (all return BEFORE 1732). 4 integration + 4 unit tests PASS, 11 adjacent regression tests PASS, cargo check clean. Reviewer APPROVE-WITH-COMMENTS 0 Criticals, M2 inline-fixed (rustdoc clarity), M1→D114+N1→D115+D116 deferred. Key design lesson: parallel dispatch site > signature change. Scope strictly respected (no scoped-hook executor, no skill SKILL.md changes, no proto). S3.T5 bridge path clear: ScopedHookExecutor: StopHook impl.
S3.s3t3_note: Landed 2026-04-15 @ c2b5307. Hybrid Option B1 deterministic fixture replay. lang/claude-code-runtime-python/tests/fixtures/skill_extraction_input_trace.json (148 lines, 6 TOOL_RESULT events) + tests/test_skill_extraction_e2e.py (348 lines, 12 pytest tests). All 5 blueprint §F verification criteria covered: hook fire/exit-code, Stop 3-way guard (3 tests locking S3.T2 reviewer C1 fix), workflow replay through MockMemoryEngine deterministic 4-tool sequence, replay output passes both hooks, N14 compliance with skill_submit_draft AssertionError honeypot. 12/12 PASS in 0.15s, ruff clean. Reviewer APPROVE-WITH-COMMENTS 0 Criticals, M1+M2+M3 inline-fixed (N14 honeypot replaces tautological assertion, fixture comment marks TOOL_RESULT-only variant + flags triplet expansion as S3.T5, .get() for cluster_id). Hooks invoked via direct bash subprocess per blueprint §D.2 — runtime ScopedHookHandler intentionally bypassed (D53 / S3.T5 owns scoped-hook executor wiring; when S3.T5 lands, _invoke_hook helper migrates to use real executor). Frozen contracts unchanged: SKILL.md/hooks/*.sh, skill-registry, L2 memory engine, runtime harnesses. 3 new Deferred D111-D113: D111 verify_skill_draft.sh rejects status='confirmed' contradicting SKILL.md cross-session refine path (latent SKILL.md ↔ hook contradiction, S3.T5 fix), D112 no Makefile target test-skill-extraction-e2e (S4.T3), D113 fixture schema_version no breaking-change protocol (defer). Pre-existing test_default_config drift on permission_mode (commit 6784994) untouched, flagged separately. RuFlo swarm-1776216312625 hierarchical: scout (Explore) blueprint /tmp/s3t3-blueprint.md 455 lines → coder → reviewer 三阶段.
S3.s3t2_note: Landed 2026-04-15 @ 27de415. examples/skills/skill-extraction/ 三文件 (SKILL.md 158 + verify_skill_draft.sh 28 + check_final_output.sh 14) + 1 Rust 测试 parse_skill_extraction_example_skill (tools/eaasp-skill-registry/tests/v2_frontmatter_test.rs:162). v2 frontmatter 通路 PostToolUse(verify_skill_draft) + Stop(check_final_output). workflow.required_tools 故意 4 项 (排除 skill_submit_draft，避开 D87 tool_choice=Specific(next) trap + 遵守 N14 人工审批门). dependencies 保留 mcp:eaasp-skill-registry 作 soft intent declaration. Reviewer APPROVE-WITH-COMMENTS C1 (check_final_output.sh 漏 evidence_anchor_id empty-string guard，4/4 hook routing 验证) + M1/M2/M3 (event shape/anchor optional fields/memory_write_file memory_id optional) 全部 inline-fixed. 10/10 v2_frontmatter test PASS. Scout blueprint 800-1000 行预估收敛到 158 行 mirror threshold-calibration 精炼. RuFlo hierarchical swarm-1776212827887 scout/coder/reviewer 三阶段. Plan 16/23.
S3.s3t1_note: Landed 2026-04-15 @ 794fb98. ADR-V2-018 Accepted. scope corrected via scout blueprint: 7 surgical deltas T1.A-T1.G (~300 LOC est, 1157 LOC actual incl tests) on existing compaction_pipeline.rs rather than new module. hook.proto PreCompactHook oneof field 18 + linear summary chain + cross-compaction budget. Reviewer 1 Critical + 3 Majors all inline-fixed: M1 context_window threaded via CompactionContext, M2 reactive_summary_ratio config field, M3+C1 tests 6+7 rewritten to use real helpers. 15/15 compaction tests PASS (8 existing + 7 new), 108 hook + 14 budget lib tests PASS, cargo check -p grid-engine clean. Python pb2 regenerated for claude-code-runtime (schema-only, delegates compaction to Anthropic SDK); hermes frozen per ADR-V2-017. 7 new Deferred D100-D106. Plan 15/23. Note: adr-v2-018 cited as Phase 2.5 goose-runtime 前置约束（shared hook schema）.
S3.note: S3.T5 新增合并 D50+D51+D53，前置 ADR-V2-006 envelope 契约. S1 DONE → unblocked. S3.T1 + S3.T2 DONE.

S4.name: CLI + E2E 验证 + thread-scoped interrupt (批次 C)
S4.s4t3_note: Landed 2026-04-15 @ a5101d5. 4 deliverables / +1404 LOC: scripts/verify-v2-phase2.sh (363 LOC orchestration) + scripts/verify-v2-phase2.py (621 LOC 14 @assertions A1-A14) + scripts/s4t3-runtime-verification.sh (398 LOC human runbook) + Makefile +22 LOC (v2-phase2-e2e / v2-phase2-e2e-full / v2-phase2-e2e-build / test-phase2-batch-ab). Key inversions vs MVP (verify-v2-mvp.{sh,py} @ a6fad2b): SKIP_RUNTIMES=true default + WITH_BUILD=false default (automated portion uses fixture replay; --with-runtimes / --with-build opt-ins); A10 guarded under SKIP_RUNTIMES because /v1/sessions/create transitively invokes l1.initialize via gRPC (session_orchestrator.py:259 → l1_client.py:90-98 → api.py 502). Binary pre-flight for eaasp-skill-registry hoisted out of runtimes-only branch since it starts on every path. Pattern parity: byte-identical _kill_tree/_kill_port/check_port_free/wait_for_port helpers (32/32 grep match), trust_env=False httpx client, trap EXIT/INT/TERM. 14 assertions mapped 1:1 to §S4.T3 exit criteria bullets: A1 D87 regression via --test d87_multi_step_workflow_regression, A2 grid-runtime D83/D85/D86 whole-crate, A3-A5 L2 seed+hybrid search with FTS-only graceful-degrade, A6 L3 telemetry smoke, A7 ErrorClassifier 36 tests, A8 skill extraction deterministic fixture replay via pytest from lang/claude-code-runtime-python, A9 tool_result_aggregate_spill S2.T5 with --test flag, A10 PreCompact /v1/events/ingest 3-step flow (create → ingest → GET events) SKIP_RUNTIMES-guarded, A11 stop_hooks_integration S3.T4, A12 aggregate make test-phase2-batch-ab, A13 CLI smoke graceful-degrade, A14 runbook execute-bit check. Exit criterion #2 (三 runtime 6 步) explicitly deferred to human via scripts/s4t3-runtime-verification.sh per ADR-V2-017 (hermes frozen → 2 runtimes): prerequisites gate + service health probes + run_skill_on_runtime with CLI session create/send + 15s settle (S4T3_SETTLE_SECONDS override) + jq-based PRE_TOOL_USE counting (≥4) + per-runtime PASS/FAIL/SKIPPED + exit 0/1/2. Reviewer REQUEST-CHANGES cycle: C1 fixed (A10 would 502 under default SKIP_RUNTIMES because session/create needs grid-runtime), M1 fixed (eaasp-skill-registry binary check hoisted), M4 fixed (A13 comment claude-runtime-setup → cli-v2-setup), N1 fixed (chmod 755 on verify-v2-phase2.py matching MVP); M2 (.venv pre-flight warning) / M3 (skill-registry dir wipe, inherited from MVP) / N2 (NOTE prints before PASS — cosmetic) / N3 (A10 event_id idempotency) deferred as D126/D127/D128. Post-fix verification: bash -n + py_compile + ruff clean + all 4 make targets resolve + stat -f confirms 755 all 3 scripts. RuFlo swarm-1776258196844 hierarchical: scout (Explore) 781-line /tmp/s4t3-blueprint.md + /tmp/s4t3-corrections.md path/test-filter corrections → 3 parallel coders T3.A (bash+Makefile) / T3.B (Python 14 assertions) / T3.C (runtime runbook) non-overlapping scopes → reviewer → C1+M1+M4+N1 inline-fixed → re-verified. Plan 22/23, S4 3/4 DONE.

prerequisite_adrs.ADR-V2-015: Accepted 2026-04-14 — L2 Memory Engine semantic 检索选型 (四层抽象 + HNSW in-process + pgvector 迁移三触发条件)
prerequisite_adrs.ADR-V2-016: Accepted 2026-04-14 — capability matrix + Eager probe + tool_choice=Required + L1 metadata required_tools. Multi-model E2E verified. See ADR for full Decision Evolution + E2E Verification Record.
prerequisite_adrs.ADR-V2-017: Accepted 2026-04-14 — L1 Runtime 生态策略（主力 grid-runtime + 样板 hermes/nanobot/pydantic-ai/claude-code + 对比 goose/ccb/claw-code 三轨）。hermes 冻结，D88 由 Phase 2.5 goose-runtime 替代解决。
prerequisite_adrs.ADR-V2-018: Accepted 2026-04-15 — PreCompact hook + iterative summary reuse + cross-compaction budget. hook.proto PreCompactHook oneof field 18 (8 fields). Linear summary chain (latest-only), proactive summary_ratio=0.2 vs reactive 0.5, task_budget_remaining survives compaction. Cited as Phase 2.5 goose-runtime 前置 schema 约束. Locks S3.T1 implementation.
prerequisite_adrs.ADR-V2-006: Accepted 2026-04-15 — Hook envelope contract (PreToolUse/PostToolUse/Stop). §2 stdin JSON schema with event/session_id/skill_id/tool_name+args/tool_result+is_error/draft_memory_id/evidence_anchor_id/created_at. §3 GRID_* env vars (SESSION_ID/TOOL_NAME/SKILL_ID/EVENT). §4 exit 0 allow / 2 deny / other fail-open. §5 substitute_hook_vars ${SKILL_DIR}/${SESSION_DIR}/${RUNTIME_DIR} at Initialize. §6 5s default timeout. §7 fail-open universal (EAASP §10.8). §8 cross-runtime parity obligation (Rust+Python MUST satisfy identically). §10 4 test vectors machine-checkable. Locks S3.T5 implementation. Python side fully compliant; Rust has latent gap filed D120 for Phase 2.5 goose cert.
